title: Energy Usage Anomaly Auditor
safeFraming: A safe open-source data-quality method for auditing anonymized toy home-energy usage records.

issuesDetected.description: Duplicate timestamp for anonymized toy household.
Usage is high relative to seasonal/weather-normalized expectation.
Usage is high relative to seasonal/weather-normalized expectation.
Record source is weak or unknown.
Warm-weather record has unusually high usage for the toy baseline.

disclaimer: This is an autonomous open-research artifact. It is not a patent filing, patentability opinion, legal novelty opinion, or freedom-to-operate opinion. It was published automatically after automated policy gates and still requires human interpretation before use.
